printed.name: Roll Over
printed.setup: Lying supine with lower back and pelvis on barrel, legs straight and together, feet plantarflexed, hands holding levers, body on diagonal line
printed.resistance: Socket: C, Lever Orientation: 0, Lever Length: 1, Lever Direction: 5, Connector: O, Spring: Y/S

movement.inhale: Lift legs to 90 degrees in hip joint
movement.exhale: Roll over, legs parallel to floor

objectives: Lower back and hip extensor stretch
cues: Maintain 90 degree angle in hip joint during roll over
Keep thighs close to chest when rolling back
Avoid lowering legs beyond diagonal line
